# dokku_app_traefik (Resource)

Manages custom Traefik container labels on a Dokku app (`dokku traefik:labels:add` / `dokku traefik:labels:remove`). A deploy or rebuild (`dokku ps:rebuild`) is required for label changes to take effect on running containers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String)
- `labels` (Map of String) Map of Traefik container label names to values, e.g. `{ "traefik.http.routers.web.middlewares" = "my-middleware" }`. Values are passed unquoted over the SSH forced-command interface, so they may not contain whitespace.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
